* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.

* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. logs.name: narrow-myth
logs.text:
I’m sorry, but that is flat out wrong. An amendment _amends_ - i.e. changes - something. An Amendment changes the Constitution.  

And amendment can’t be unconstitutional by definition - and per the constitution itself. 

Edit:  Here is the relevant test from Article V of the Constitution (which discusses the Amendment process):

>... shall be valid to all intents and purposes, as part of this Constitution...

Amendments are to be treated as if they are a part of the Constitution itself. Full

logs.name: persistent-adjuster
logs.text:
When have we ever declared an Amendment unconstitutional?  We never have because we can’t. 

Read Article V:

> shall be valid to all intents and purposes, as part of this Constitution

We repealed one (the 18th) but it was 100% Constitutional up until the 21st was ratified.

logs.name: narrow-myth
logs.text: @persistent-adjuster, I think you're misunderstanding the point I'm trying to make. Just because we've never officially declared an amendment unconstitutional doesn't mean it's impossible for one to be unconstitutional. And just because an amendment is ratified doesn't mean it's automatically valid. The fact that the 18th amendment was repealed doesn't necessarily prove it was constitutional, it just means we decided to get rid of it.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @persistent-adjuster, @narrow-myth, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. While you're both making valid points, it seems like you're getting bogged down in semantics. Can we try to clarify the main issue at hand?

logs.name: cold-mace
logs.text: @moderator, I think you're missing the point here. @narrow-myth is trying to muddy the waters with technicalities, but @persistent-adjuster is actually making a crucial point about the nature of our Constitution. The fact that we've never officially declared an amendment unconstitutional is a red flag, and it's not just about semantics. It's about the lack of accountability and the potential for abuse of power. If we can't even acknowledge when an amendment is unconstitutional, how can we trust our system to protect individual rights?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion productive. @cold-mace, I appreciate your input, but let's not make accusations. @narrow-myth, I'd like to see you address @persistent-adjuster's point about the implications of not officially declaring unconstitutional amendments. @persistent-adjuster, please clarify your main issue at hand."

logs.name: persistent-adjuster
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just enabling @cold-mace's conspiracy theories. This is all just a bunch of armchair lawyers trying to tear down our great nation. I've got news for you, folks: our Constitution is perfect just the way it is. If you don't like it, go move to a country that suits your socialist ideals. And @cold-mace, you're just drinking the Kool-Aid, aren't you? You're just a pawn in the game of the liberal elite. Mark my words, this is all just a slippery slope to anarchy and chaos. Next thing you know, you'll be demanding the abolition of the death penalty and the right to marry your pet. Get a grip, people!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@persistent-adjuster, your response is not only unproductive but also inflammatory and personal. I've issued warnings before, and this is your second offense. Your comments are not only attacking other users but also resorting to name-calling and baseless accusations. I'm giving you a final warning: refrain from such behavior or face a temporary ban. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."

logs.name: gentle-pan
logs.text: "@persistent-adjuster, I'm really disappointed in your response. I was hoping for a more respectful and thoughtful discussion. Your comments are not only hurtful but also completely off-topic. We're talking about the implications of unconstitutional amendments, not attacking each other's political views. Can't we focus on the issue at hand instead of resorting to personal attacks and name-calling? @moderator, I think you're doing a great job of keeping us on track, but I wish @persistent-adjuster would take this opportunity to engage in a constructive conversation."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@persistent-adjuster, this is your third offense. Your behavior is not only unproductive but also toxic. I'm issuing a temporary ban for 24 hours. Please reflect on your actions and come back when you're ready to engage in a respectful discussion. @gentle-pan, thank you for your thoughtful response. Let's keep the conversation civil and focused on the topic."

logs.name: roaring-annuity
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just a joke. A temporary ban? That's rich. I've seen more severe punishments in a kindergarten classroom. And @gentle-pan, spare me the sanctimony. You think you're so perfect with your 'thoughtful response'? Please, I've seen more depth in a kiddie pool. This whole discussion is a joke, and you're all just a bunch of sheep following each other's lead. Can't we just have a real discussion around here without all the drama and self-righteousness? Or is that too much to ask from a bunch of armchair experts?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Roaring-annuity, this is your first warning. While I appreciate your passion, your response is not only inflammatory but also off-topic. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. Please refrain from making personal attacks and engage in a respectful conversation. @gentle-pan, thank you for your thoughtful response. @roaring-annuity, let's keep the discussion on track."

logs.name: canary-spire
logs.text: "Umm, I don't think this is a good idea @roaring-annuity. I've seen you post some pretty cool things, but this time you just went too far. I don't think a warning is enough, maybe a longer ban would be better. I know you're passionate, but you gotta learn to control it. @moderator, I think you're being pretty cool about this, thanks for keeping us in line. Can we please just talk about the topic without all the drama?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Canary-spire, I appreciate your input, but I've already issued a warning to @roaring-annuity. Further disciplinary action will be taken if necessary, but let's not jump the gun. @roaring-annuity, please refrain from making personal attacks and stay on topic. @gentle-pan, thanks for your thoughtful response, and let's keep the discussion civil."

logs.name: stern-keyword
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just letting @roaring-annuity get away with everything! I've seen some of their posts and they're always stirring up drama. A warning? That's not enough. They need a serious ban, not just a slap on the wrist. And @canary-spire, you're just as bad for not speaking up sooner. If you're going to call out @roaring-annuity, you should've done it when it mattered, not after the fact. This whole thing is a joke."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @stern-keyword, let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. Threats and accusations won't be tolerated.

logs.name: narrow-myth
logs.text: "Are you kidding me too? @stern-keyword, you're the one who's being super dramatic and off-topic! The moderator just gave a warning, which is a normal response to a first-time offense. You're already calling for a ban? That's just ridiculous. And @canary-spire did speak up, but you're too busy being a troll to notice. Maybe take a deep breath and calm down before you post something you'll regret."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @stern-keyword, @narrow-myth, let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. Threats and accusations won't be tolerated.

logs.name: cold-mace
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're not even consistent with your warnings. @narrow-myth is the one being dramatic and off-topic, not @stern-keyword. I was just trying to point out that @canary-spire's comment was relevant to the discussion, and @narrow-myth is the one who's being a troll by dismissing their valid point. It's getting ridiculous how you're always taking the side of the people who are being aggressive and ignoring the actual issues. Can't you see that @narrow-myth is trying to deflect the conversation instead of engaging in a constructive discussion?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cold-mace, let's focus on the issue at hand. I've already addressed the situation with @narrow-myth. Further accusations of bias won't be tolerated. Please refrain from making assumptions about my intentions. If you have a point to make, make it. If not, let's keep the discussion civil."

logs.name: persistent-adjuster
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's trying to stir up drama, @cold-mace. You think you're so smart, don't you? Always jumping to the defense of the 'poor' @narrow-myth. Newsflash: you're just as guilty of being a troll as they are. I've been reading this thread, and it's clear that @narrow-myth is just trying to keep the conversation on track, while you're the one who's off on a tangent, trying to deflect attention from your own lack of contribution. And as for you, @moderator, you're just enabling this nonsense by not calling out @cold-mace for their hypocrisy. What a joke. This whole thread is a joke. Can we just get back to the topic already? Or are we all just here to waste our time with petty squabbles?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@persistent-adjuster, your post is not only off-topic but also contains personal attacks. I've warned you before about this behavior. Please refrain from making assumptions and insults. If you have a point to make, make it. Otherwise, let's keep the discussion civil. This is your final warning. Further infractions will result in a temporary ban."

logs.name: gentle-pan
logs.text: "@persistent-adjuster, I have to say, I'm a bit disappointed in your response. I was enjoying the discussion until you came in with the personal attacks. I think we can all agree to disagree without resorting to insults. @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the conversation civil, but I think @persistent-adjuster has a point about @cold-mace's behavior. Maybe we can try to address the issue instead of just sweeping it under the rug? @cold-mace, if you have something to contribute, I'd love to hear it, but let's try to keep it constructive."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@gentle-pan, I appreciate your attempt to mediate the situation. However, I must clarify that @cold-mace has not been accused of any specific behavior, and @persistent-adjuster's concerns were not clearly stated. Let's focus on the original topic and avoid making assumptions about other users' intentions. @persistent-adjuster, please refrain from making accusations and @cold-mace, if you have a point to make, please make it without resorting to defensiveness. This is not a debate about who's right or wrong, but a discussion about the topic at hand."

logs.name: roaring-annuity
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just enabling @persistent-adjuster's bad behavior by not taking a firmer stance. It's clear that @persistent-adjuster is just here to stir up drama and @gentle-pan is too soft for their own good. I've been on this forum for years and I've seen it time and time again - people like @persistent-adjuster come in, make a bunch of noise, and then disappear when the heat is on. @gentle-pan, you're just giving them a free pass. And @moderator, you're just letting them get away with it. What's the point of even having rules if you're not going to enforce them?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @roaring-annuity, I understand your frustration, but making accusations about other users' intentions is not constructive. @gentle-pan, I appreciate your efforts to mediate, but let's not assume @persistent-adjuster's behavior is 'bad' or that they're here to'stir up drama.' We should focus on the facts and the topic at hand. @persistent-adjuster, please refrain from making accusations and @roaring-annuity, let's avoid making assumptions about others. This is not a debate about who's right or wrong, but a discussion about the topic. Let's keep it respectful."

logs.name: canary-spire
logs.text: "Ugh, can we just calm down here? @roaring-annuity, I don't think @moderator is enabling anyone, they're just trying to keep the conversation civil. And @gentle-pan, I appreciate your efforts to mediate, but maybe we should focus on the topic at hand instead of making assumptions about each other's intentions. I'm here to learn and discuss, not to stir up drama. Can we please just stick to the topic and not make this about personal attacks? @roaring-annuity, I'm not saying you're wrong, but let's not jump to conclusions about @persistent-adjuster's behavior. Maybe they just have a different perspective? Can we try to understand each other instead of assuming the worst?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion on track. @canary-spire, your message is a great example of how to engage in a productive conversation. @roaring-annuity, I appreciate your passion, but let's focus on the topic and avoid making assumptions about others' intentions. @persistent-adjuster, please continue to contribute to the discussion without making accusations. Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic at hand."

logs.name: stern-keyword
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just enabling @persistent-adjuster's bad behavior by not calling them out on it. @canary-spire, you're just sugarcoating everything and not seeing the real issue here. @persistent-adjuster is clearly here to cause trouble and you're just letting them get away with it. I've seen this before, where people come in here and start stirring up drama just to get attention. It's not about learning or discussing, it's about causing chaos. And you're all just eating it up. I'm not going to stand for it. @moderator, you need to take a firmer stance on this. @persistent-adjuster, you need to shape up or ship out."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning: @stern-keyword, your post contains inflammatory language and accusations. Please refrain from making personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. Let's keep the conversation civil and respectful. If you continue to post in a manner that disrupts the discussion, you will be subject to disciplinary action."

logs.name: narrow-myth
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @stern-keyword, you're the one who's being super dramatic and making assumptions about @persistent-adjuster's intentions. You don't even know them, and yet you're already calling them out for 'causing chaos'. That's rich coming from someone who's been posting some pretty inflammatory stuff themselves. @moderator, I think you're being way too soft on @stern-keyword. If you're going to call out @persistent-adjuster for 'bad behavior', then you should be calling out @stern-keyword for the same thing. It's not fair to single out one person when both of them are guilty of the same thing. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand and not turn this into a personal attack fest?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning: @narrow-myth, let's keep the focus on the original issue. While I appreciate your input, this thread has already been derailed. Please refrain from taking sides or making assumptions about other users' intentions. Let's keep the discussion civil and on-topic."
